subcodes.first_line: O thou who rejoicest in the glad-tidings of God! That home which turneth into the nest and shelter of the birds of the garden of Divine Unity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستبشر ببشارات الله آن خانه و کاشانه که لانه و آشیانه طیور گلشن توحید گردد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized)
